const newToken: WalletToken = {
                            token: currency,
                            balance,
                            balanceFormatted,
                            selected: true,
                          }
                          
                          setBatchTokens([...batchTokens, newToken])
                          toast.success(`Added ${currency.symbol} to batch swap${balanceFormatted !== '0' ? ` (Balance: ${balanceFormatted})` : ''}`)
